prompt: create a page for Cat-themed 404 page: cute ASCII-art feline knocking over a coffee mug, pastel background, big 'Oops!' headline in handwritten font
prompt_refined: Generate a full 404 error web page with a whimsical cat theme. At the top of the page, display a large 'Oops!' headline in a charming handwritten font. Below the headline and centered on the page, feature a cute ASCII-art feline character depicted mid-action, humorously knocking over a coffee mug. The entire background of the web page should be rendered in soft, pastel colors.
objects: Cute ASCII-art feline character centered on the page
Coffee mug being humorously knocked over
